subject: [CPS] Fix errors on CPS module and release 10.3.2 version
commit_message:
[CPS] Fix errors on CPS module and release 10.3.2 version

Fix getting schame-set
Use API versioning

Issue-ID: INT-2194
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I541ca9d143b0fa184fb5b734b4b355d44040d30b

Patch Set 1:

Hi @Jessica. Can you help me to understand why tox jobs are not running when I push a change. I thought it will be fixed by https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/132917
I thought that if I'm using 'integration-linters' jobs it should be executed on change push. Could you help me to figure it out? I want to run all tox jobs there on push

@Michal, I see it still failing:
https://jenkins.onap.org/view/ci-management/job/ci-management-jjb-merge/

Looking further, it seems like the issue might be after trying to translate the template which I am surprised the verify job didn't caught. 

Can you please revert https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/132917, We might need to look into it in more detail in the sandbox.

Patch Set 2:

I tried the revert but the merge job is still failing .. I am investigating with my team if this is something that just is in bad state or is caused by something else... I will take care of re-merging your change if it was not the cause..
